name: HAKRC Flytower Stack - F722 F7230 V2 FC + 50A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC - 30.5x30.5
description: The HAKRC Flytower Stack is a powerful and professional-grade stack built for advanced FPV drone applications.

name: HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (MPU6000) + 70A AM32 ESC - 20x20
description: The HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (MPU6000 Gyro) + 70A AM32 ESC - 20x20 combines the Halo Flight Controller and Halo 4in1 70A ESC into a race-ready powertrain, engineered by HDZero—leaders in high-performance digital FPV systems.

name: HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (ICM42688) + 70A BLHeli_32 ESC - 20x20
description: The HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (ICM42688) + 70A BLHeli_32 ESC - 20x20 combines the Halo Flight Controller and Halo 4in1 70A ESC into a race-ready powertrain, engineered by HDZero—leaders in high-performance digital FPV systems.

name: Flycolor SpeedyPizza CrustCore Stack - F7 FC + 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 - 20x20
description: The Flycolor SpeedyPizza CrustCore Stack delivers high-performance flight control and powerful ESC capabilities in a compact 20x20mm form factor. Featuring an F7 flight controller with the ICM42688 gyro, this stack ensures ultra-precise handling and smooth performance.

name: Axisflying Argus ECO Stack - F4 FC + 60A 6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC - 30x30
description: The Axisflying Argus ECO Stack features an F4 flight controller and 60A 6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC, providing a powerful yet lightweight solution for FPV builds.

name: Hobbywing XRotor Stack - F7 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The Hobbywing XRotor Stack, equipped with an STM32F722 MCU and a high-sensitivity ICM20602 six-axis motion sensor, offers powerful computing abilities and fast processing speed.

name: DarwinFPV Cement Stack - F7 FC + 100A 3-8S ESC - ICM42688
description: Introducing Darwin FPV's "Cement" stack: the ultimate solution for professional pilots, addressing the reliability issues of FPV drones.

name: Holybro F7 Stack - F722 Kakute FC - TEKKO32 F4 50A 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5 x 30.5
description: Introducing the Holybro Kakute F7 Stack: a powerful fusion of the Holybro Kakute F722 flight controller and TEKKO32 F4 50A 4-in-1 ESC.

name: TBS Lucid Pro Stack - F4 FC + 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - MPU6000 - Gorilla 39x16
description: The TBS Lucid Pro Stack designed for racing and freestyle, caters to both seasoned pilots and newcomers.

name: TBS Lucid Freestyle Stack - F4 FC + 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 - Gorilla 39x16
description: The TBS Lucid Freestyle Flight Stack, designed for racing and freestyle, caters to both seasoned pilots and newcomers.

name: Skystars Fly Stack - F722 Mini HD Pro FC + KM35 PRO 35A BLHeli_32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features an F722 Mini HD Pro Flight Controller and a Kramam PRO 35A BLHeli_32 4-i-n1 ESC with a 20x20 mounting pattern!

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 65A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration.

name: GEPRC F722 AIO - F722 FC+ 35A 2S-6S BLS ESC
description: The GEPRC F722 AIO is equipped with an F722 FC and 35A 2S-6S BLS ESC. This AIO stack adopts MCU STM32F722, which gives a powerful performance and higher computing speed.

name: Flywoo GOKU Pro Mini Stack - F7 FC + 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 - 20x20
description: The Flywoo GOKU Pro Mini Stack is a high-performance 20x20mm flight stack featuring an F7 flight controller and a 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC.

name: Flywoo GOKU Stack - F722 FC (ICM42688) + 55A AM32 2-6S ESC - 30x30
description: The new GOKU Pro V2 F722 AM32 55A BLS Stack from FLYWOO offers a compact size, high-performance main control, and multiple motor outputs.

name: iFlight BLITZ Stack - F7 V1.2 FC + E55 4-in-1 55A ESC
description: The iFlight BLITZ F7 Stack features an F7 V1.2 Flight Controller and an E55 4-in-1 55A ESC. The V1.1 FC now has a new gyro, improved circuit design, better components, and a lower noise level!

name: Flywoo GOKU V3 HD Stack - F4 FC + 35A 2-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC w/ LED + ELRS 2.4GHz - 16x16
description: The Flywoo GOKU V3 HD Stack combines high-performance components in a compact 16x16mm design, ideal for QUAD drone builds. Featuring an F4 flight controller and a 35A 2-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC, this stack ensures smooth and reliable power delivery for your drone.

name: Iflight Borg 5S 60R Stack F4 Flight Controller 60A 3 8S Bl32 4 In 1 Esc 20X20
description: The iFlight Borg 5S 60R Stack is built for serious FPV racers, combining a high-performance Borg 5S RX F4 Flight Controller with the powerful Borg 60R 60A 4-in-1 ESC in a compact 20×20 form factor—perfect for modern 5" racing drones.

name: iFlight Borg Stack - 5S RX F4 FC + 60RS 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 4-8S ESC - 20X20
description: The iFlight Borg Stack - 5S RX FC + 60RS 4-IN-1 ESC is built for serious FPV racers, combining a high-performance Borg 5S RX F4 Flight Controller with the powerful Borg 60RS 60A 4-in-1 ESC in a compact 20×20 form factor.

name: HGLRC Specter Integrated Stack Box - F722 FC + 60A 2-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: Introducing the HGLRC Specter Integrated Stack Box - your hassle-free solution for thrilling flights.

name: Flywoo GOKU HEX V3 HD Stack - F4 FC + 20A 2-4S 6-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC w/ LED + ELRS 2.4GHz - 16x16
description: The Flywoo GOKU HEX V3 HD Stack combines high-performance components in a compact 16x16mm design, ideal for HEX drone builds. Featuring an F4 flight controller and a 20A 2-4S 6-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC, this stack ensures smooth and reliable power delivery for your drone.

name: Axisflying Argus Mini Stack - F722 FC + 40A 4-6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 20x20
description: The lightweight Axisflying Argus Mini Stack is specially designed for small-size FPV drones.

name: SkyStars Mini Fly Stack - F722 Mini HD Pro FC + KM40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The SkyStars Mini Fly Stack features an F722 Mini HD Pro flight controller and a Kramam KM40 40A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC with a 20x20 mounting pattern!

name: NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 305 Stack - F7 ELRS FC + 80A AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5x30.5
description: NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 305 Stack - F7 ELRS FC + 80A AM32 4-in-1 ESC - combines advanced control with unmatched power.

name: SkyStars Fly Stack - F722 HD Pro FC + KM40 Pro 40A BLHeli_32 ESC - Mini 20x20
description: This SkyStars Fly Stack - F722 HD Pro FC and  KM40 Pro 40A ESC is a powerful 3-6S 20x20 stack with superior electronics.

name: HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (MPU6000) + 70A BLHeli_32 ESC - 20x20
description: The HDZero Halo Stack - H743 ELRS FC (MPU6000 Gyro) + 70A BLHeli_32 ESC - 20x20 combines the Halo Flight Controller and Halo 4in1 70A ESC into a race-ready powertrain, engineered by HDZero—leaders in high-performance digital FPV systems.

name: XILO Stax V3 Combo - F4 FC + 50A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
description: The XILO Stax V3 Combo (AM32) continues XILO's tradition of offering high-quality FPV gear at a low price point. It couldn't be easier to install and use on your favorite airframe!

name: T-Motor Pro II HD Stack - F7 FC + 55A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The T-Motor Pro II HD Stack combines an F7 flight controller with a 55A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC for precision and reliability.

name: Axisflying Argus Pro Plug-n-Play Stack - F7 FC + 65A 3-6S BLHeli_32 ESC w/ Heatsink - 30x30
description: The Axisflying Argus Pro series combines durability and performance with an aluminum-wrapped, IP54-rated design to protect its PCB from dust and water.

name: T-Motor Pro II HD Stack - F722 FC + 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: Introducing the T-Motor F7 & F55A Stack, now designed specifically for the DJI Digital FPV System!

name: T-Motor Velox SE Stack - F7 FC + V50A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The T-Motor Velox SE F7 Stack is compatible with 8 motor outputs and X8 drones, boasts a 42688 gyroscope, and firmware 4.4.3 or higher for enhanced stability.

name: DarwinFPV Stack - F411 FC + 30A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The DarwinFPV Stack - F411 FC + 30A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC  is currently the cheapest stack in the FPV world, designed to reduce the budget of entry-level FPV drones as much as possible.

name: Flycolor Raptor TR20 Mini Stack - F722 FC + 60A ESC - 20x20
description: The Flycolor Raptor TR20 Mini Stack features an F722 Flight Controller, equipped with dual VTX and dual LED pads, offering a convenient selection nearby for enhanced customization.

name: Flywoo GOKU Stack - GN405S FC (ICM42688) 20A ESC AIO + HM850 850MW Microphone VTX
description: The Flywoo Goku Stack is a high-performance, all-in-one solution for your FPV drone.

name: Axisflying Argus ECO Stack - F405 FC + 55A 6S BLHeli_S ESC
description: The Axisflying Argus ECO 55A+F405 STACK combines a lightweight F405 flight controller and a 4in1 55A ESC board.

name: Diatone Mamba Mini Stack - MK4 F722 APP FC (MPU6000) + 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 128K ESC - 20x20
description: The Diatone Mamba Mini Stack - MK4 F722 APP FC (MPU6000) + 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 128K ESC - 20x20 brings a new design scheme, with an easier-to-use flight controller. This 4th generation flight controller features very large pads, synchronous rectifying BEC, and MPU6000 Gyro to name a few.

description: EXCLUSIVE GETFPV PREORDER! The Diatone Mamba Mini Stack features an F722 MK4 flight controller with ICM42688P gyro and the new Mamba5 Reactor, a 66A 4-8S ESC with BLHeli_32 firmware and 128K PWM.

description: EXCLUSIVE GETFPV PREORDER! The Diatone Mamba Mini Stack features an F722 MK4 flight controller with MPU6000 gyro and the new Mamba5 Reactor, a 66A 4-8S ESC with BLHeli_32 firmware and 128K PWM.

description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features a F411 Mini HD Flight Controller and a Kramam 25A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC with a 20x20 mounting pattern.

name: RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE Stack - F722 DJI FC + 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 128K Extreme Edition ESC
description: The RUSH BLADE F722 Stack for the DJI Digital FPV System features the RUSH BLADE F722 Digital Flight Controller and RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Extreme Edition).

name: T-Motor VELOX F7 HD Stack - F7 HD FC + V45A V2 ESC
description: The T-Motor VELOX F7 HD Stack comes with the F7 HD FC and a V45A V2 ESC.

name: SpeedyBee F405 Stack - F405 V3 FC + 50A 3-6s BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The SpeedyBee F405 Stack - F405 V3 FC + 50A 3-6s BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30 features Bluetooth Pairing, Onboard 4-level Battery Indicators, 1500uF Filtering Capacitator, Built-in Barometer, and many more!

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F722 FC + 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 128K ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Mini Stack features a 20x20 MK4 F722 Flight Controller and 40A 128K ESC. With OSD and an ICM42688P Gyro, this stack is the perfect addition to your FPV build.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F405 FC + 30A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Mini Stack features a 20x20 MK4 F405 Flight Controller and 30A ESC with OSD and an MPU650 Gyro.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F405 FC + 40A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC - Mini 20x20
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Mini Stack features a 20x20 MK4 F405 Flight Controller and 40A ESC with OSD and an MPU650 Gyro.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F722 APP FC + 65A 3-6S BHeli_32 128K ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Stack features an MK4 APP F722 Flight Controller and 65A 128K ESC with OSD and an ICM42688P Gyro.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F722 APP FC + 55A 3-6S BHeli_32 128K ESC (ICM42688P)
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Stack features an MK4 APP F722 Flight Controller and 55A 128K ESC with OSD and an ICM42688P Gyro.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - MK4 F722 APP FC + 45A 3-6S BHeli_32 128K ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Stack features an MK4 APP F722 Flight Controller and 45A 128K ESC with OSD and an ICM42688P Gyro.

name: T-Motor VELOX Lite F411 Stack - F411 Lite FC + V45A Lite ESC
description: The T-Motor VELOX Lite F411 Stack is a budget-friendly stack that is equipped with the VELOX Lite F411 FC and the VELOX Lite V45A 3-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC.

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Stack - F722 HD Pro2 FC + KM50 Pro 50A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC - 30x30
description: The SkyStars Fly Tower Stack features an F722 HD Pro2 Flight Controller and a KM50 Pro 50A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC with a 30x30  mounting pattern.

name: Diatone Mamba Stack - DJI F405 MK2 FC + F55 55A 128K ESC
description: The Diatone Mamba DJI F405 MK2 FC 55A Stack brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This stack can push 55A all while bringing you the latest features! This stack includes the 128K version ESC. The built-in plugin allows you to easily connect to the DJI FPV Air System.

name: Holybro Kakute H7 BT Stack - Tekko32 F4 50A BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC + Atlatl HV V2
description: The Mini Kakute H7 BT Stack by Holybro comes with the Kakute H7 FC, Tekko32 F4 4-in-1 ESC (50A), and the Atlatl HV V2 VTX. Holybro is saving you time and guesswork by making this powerful stack that will give you max performance and great video quality!

name: Holybro Kakute H7 BT - Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC Stack
description: The Holybro Kakute H7 BT + Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC stack brings lots of power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This stack can push 65A all while bringing you the latest features!

name: Holybro Kakute H7 BT Stack - Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC + AtlatI HV V2
description: The Mini Kakute H7 BT Stack by Holybro comes with the Kakute H7 FC, Tekko32 F4 Metal 4-in-1 ESC (65A), and the Atlatl HV V2 VTX. Holybro is saving you time and guesswork by making this powerful stack that will give you max performance and great video quality!

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The Micro Combo features a 60A 4-in-1 ESC along with an updated F7 Flight Controller. This new FC is similar to other versions with its OSD, and voltage monitoring, but the F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system.

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Stack - F7 FC + KO60 60A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC - 30x30
description: The SkyStars F7+ KO60 Blheli_32 Fly Tower Stack features the SkyStars F7 HD flight controller, as well as the KO60 60A 4-in-1 ESC to give your multirotor full power!

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Stack - F7 FC + KO45 45A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC - 30x30
description: The SkyStars F7+ KO45 Blheli_32 Fly Tower Stack features the SkyStars F7 HD flight controller, as well as the KO45 45A 4-in-1 ESC to give your multirotor full power!

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Stack - F4 FC + KO55 55A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC - 30x30
description: The SkyStars F4+ KO55 Blheli_S Fly Tower Stack features the SkyStars F4 flight controller, as well as the KO55 55A 4-in-1 ESC to give your multirotor full power!

name: Flywoo GOKU HD745 EVO 40A AIO Stack + HM600 VTX
description: FLYWOO's new EVO series aims to make AIOs the new hot thing in FPV - and looking at the features, it is hard to resist everything on one board!

name: Flywoo GOKU GN745 AIO 40A BL32 Stack + HM600 VTX
description: The GOKU GNF745 40A FC Stack is one of the most integrated and powerful whoop/toothpick AIO boards on the market! Perfect for ultralight quads and toothpicks.

name: Flywoo GOKU F411 V2.1 16x16 Micro Stack + 13A 2-4S BL_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The GOKU F411 V2.1 16x16 Micro Stack by Flywoo includes the F411 Flight Controller along with the GOKU BS13A V2 4-in-1 ESC, which can handle up to 4S input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max!

name: iFlight SucceX-E Mini F7 Stack + 35A 2-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC (MPU6000)
description: This stack is plug and play - meaning that no soldering is needed. You can plug this stack into your Caddx Vista, analog VTX and it comes with a universal receiver plug!

name: Flywoo GOKU F411 F4 V2.1 16x16 Stack + 35A 2-6S BL_S 4-in-1 ESC
description: The Flywoo GOKU F4 35A nano stack features GOKU F411 F4 V2.1 16x16 FC and GOKU 35A 2-6S BL_S 4-in-1 ESC.

name: SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 + KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

name: SkyStars Fly Tower Mini Stack - F7 HD FC+ KM40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM40 40A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE F722 FC & 50A 30x30 & RUSH Tank Ⅱ VTX & RUSH PFB Stack/Combo
description: The RUSH BLADE F722 Stack for analog by RUSHFPV features the RUSH TANK II 5.8GHz VTX, RUSH BLADE F722 Flight Controller, RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Sports Edition), and the RUSH Power Filter Board (PFB), which can handle up to 6S input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

name: Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Bundle (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC)
description: The Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Stack (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC) Combo. Save 5% when buying this as a bundle!

name: T-Motor Mini F7  Stack + F45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
description: Get a better flying experience with the T-Motor Mini F45 + Mini F7 Stack! This stack brings lots of power all in a small package!

name: Flywoo GOKU GN413S 13A 2-4S AIO Toothpick FC + VTX625 Stack
description: The Flywoo GOKU GN413S AIO Toothpick FC combined with the GOKU VTX625 VTX brings lots of cool features to your small builds!

name: GEPRC STABLE F411 Stack - F411 FC + 12A BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC + 5.8GHz VTX - 16x16
description: The STABLE F411 VTX Stack by GEPRC comes with a STABLE F411  Flight Controller, 12A BLheli_32 4-in-1 ESC, and 200mW 5.8GHz VTX.

name: T-Motor F7 Stack - F7 FC + F55A PRO II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
description: T-Motor's powerful F7 Flight Controller combined with the F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance and seamless integration in your electronics stack.

name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (45A 2-6S Pro ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (30A 2-6S ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

name: Skystars Fly Stack - F722 Mini HD Pro FC + KM55 55A AM32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features an F722 Mini HD Pro Flight Controller and a Kramam 55A AM32 32Bit 3-6S 20×20 4-i-n1 ESC with a 20x20 mounting pattern.

name: SkyStars Fly Stack - F722 HD Pro 4 FC + AM60 60A AM32 ESC - 30x30
description: The Skystars F7HD Pro4 Flight Controller paired with the AM60A AM-32 32bit 4-in-1 ESC Fly Tower Stack represents a pinnacle in drone control technology, bundled in this Skystars F7+AM60 AM-32 Fly Stack.

name: Skystars Fly Stack - H743 Dual Gyro HD FC + KM60 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features a H743 Dual Gyro HD Flight Controller and a Kramam 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC with a 30x30 mounting pattern.

description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features an F722 HD Pro 3 OSD flight controller and a KO60 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC with a 30x30 mounting pattern!

description: The Skystars F4+KO50 Fly Stack showcases a synergized pairing between the F405 HD2 Flight Controller, featuring the precise BMI270 gyro, a 16MB black box for data retention, and a 5V/2A BEC, and the KO50 4in1 ESC, a robust unit supporting the efficient BLHeli_S protocol.

description: The Flywoo GOKU V3 HD Stack combines high-performance components in a compact 16x16mm design, ideal for QUAD drone builds. Featuring an F4 flight controller and a 20A 2-4S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC, this stack ensures smooth and reliable power delivery for your drone.

name: Orqa DTK APB — FC + Companion Computer (i.MX8M Plus + STM32H743)
description: Single-board flight computer combining an STM32H743 flight controller with an NXP i.MX8M Plus companion computer (4x Cortex-A53 + Cortex-M7). Dual MIPI-CSI camera inputs (digital + analog via ADV7282 CVBS decoder), 2.25 TOPS NPU for on-board AI, H.265/H.264 1080p60 hardware encoder, ORQA OSD engine (max7456 emulation over I2C), PCIe expansion, CAN bus, GPIO-switched UART routing, USB 3.0, and runs Orqa Yocto Linux BSP. Designed for FPV, autonomous robotics, and hybrid smart drone applications. Part of the DTK ecosystem.
osd: ORQA OSD engine — I2C2 (/dev/i2c-1) @ 0x0a, max7456 emulation

UART3.location: Internal switch — routes to CSI1, CSI2, or FC via GPIO4_IO00 (SW1) + GPIO4_IO13 (SW2)

power.note: USB-C alone may not power FC — supplement with external PSU for full operation

partitions.data: General use (remaining flash, persists across updates)

software: Orqa Yocto Linux BSP + Orqa SDK (Developer Program)
